description: Duplicate-avoidance must follow only the group the track was picked from. The member 'dp' (avoid_duplicates=false) belongs to two groups: grp_active (avoid off, enabled) and grp_dedup (avoid on, disabled). Only grp_active plays, so dp is selected via a path with no duplicate avoidance. Even though m1 was recently played, the disabled grp_dedup's flag must not leak in, so dp picks its lowest-weight track m1 (not m2).
